steps.title: Find the highest output
steps.content: The assertion asks which body of water had the plant with the highest average power generated in 2019. The table must be scanned for the largest value in that column.

steps.title: Compare the listed rivers
steps.content: A is 14,126 MWh, C is 2,204 MWh, and D is 10,693 MWh, all below the top value. Hiwassee Dam on the Hiwassee River generated 196,220 MWh, the largest figure shown. The answer is B.
